options_deliberated.approach: Reword AGENTS.md:9 to '10-step pool' including triage and recompute AGENTS.md:10 agent decomposition as '10 producer + 7 reviewer = 17' — but filesystem shows 16 agent files, so this would invent a non-existent triage agent file.
options_deliberated.trade_offs: Aligns step count with filesystem dir listing, but requires either creating .claude/agents/triage*.md or breaking the producer/reviewer arithmetic; introduces scope creep.

options_deliberated.approach: Treat triage/ as a pre-flow stage (consistent with AGENTS.md:7 'None ↔ Triage → Flow[...]'), keep 'Step pool: 9 steps' unchanged, but add an explicit 'Triage (pre-flow, hook-driven, no agent file)' annotation to AGENTS.md and reconcile 9 producer + 7 reviewer = 16 in a clarifying parenthetical.
options_deliberated.trade_offs: Preserves filesystem reality and existing arithmetic; minimal doc churn; surfaces the c1/c2 ambiguity without changing semantics. Requires a small AGENTS.md edit and a downstream Report-only summary (Spec/Implement not needed for plan-standalone).

options_deliberated.approach: Delete triage/ directory to make filesystem match AGENTS.md '9 steps'.
options_deliberated.trade_offs: Destructive; loses steps/triage/README.md content; contradicts AGENTS.md:7 that explicitly names Triage in the entry path; out of scope for plan-standalone documentation-reconciliation intent.

chosen.rationale: O2 reconciles documentation phrasing with Ground filesystem inventory (10 step dirs, 16 agent files) by clarifying that Triage is a pre-flow stage rather than a member of the Step pool, matching the existing AGENTS.md:7 wording. It does not invent files (avoids R13 violation), does not destroy existing artifacts (O3), and respects the plan-standalone scope which produces a plan document rather than code changes.

components.name: AGENTS.md Step pool clarification
components.responsibility: Disambiguate '9-step pool' (post-flow-entry) from Triage (pre-flow) and align '16 agents: 9 producer + 7 reviewer' decomposition with the 16 files enumerated by ls -1 .claude/agents/.

components.name: plan-standalone artifact
components.responsibility: This Decide plan document captures the reconciliation decision; Report step renders the summary. No Spec/Implement/Verify required (Investigate.architecture_impact.has_architecture_level=false).

non_goals: Creating new agent files (no triage agent)

policies.statement: Filesystem inventory (Ground t3/t4/t5 with diff=identical) is the authoritative reference for counts; documentation phrases must annotate, not contradict, inventory.
Triage is a pre-flow stage (per AGENTS.md:7) and is excluded from the in-flow 'Step pool' enumeration; this is a definitional convention, not an arithmetic error.
emberdeck (ED) unavailable in this session — intent_card_id field omitted per R13 degrade policy; no PENDING placeholder emitted.

user_flows.outcome: produces a flow report summarizing the count reconciliation (9 in-flow steps + 1 pre-flow Triage = 10 dirs; 9 producer + 7 reviewer = 16 agent files) without modifying source files.
understands from accompanying clarification (proposed in T2) that Triage is a pre-flow stage and the 10th steps/ directory.

requirements.description: Decide plan document must exist at .blazewrit/plans/plan-standalone-test-json-decide.json and be valid JSON.

verify_probe.negative_test: missing file or invalid JSON → exit != 0

requirements.description: Plan must cite Ground tool_calls t2-t5 by id in verification_proof.inherited_from_ground (no laundering).
Plan must not contain placeholder tokens forbidden by R13 (PENDING-, TBD, not_tracked, unavailable as values).
Plan must echo expected_next_step verbatim as 'report' (R16).
intent_card_id field must be omitted (emberdeck unavailable per Ground.unknowns.ed_query).
Reconciliation narrative (chosen.rationale + chosen_architecture) must reference both Triage-as-pre-flow distinction and the 9-producer/7-reviewer = 16 arithmetic.

task_list.description: Report agent reads this plan and ground/investigation artifacts.

Report agent renders reconciliation summary stating: (a) steps/ contains 10 dirs, (b) AGENTS.md:9 'Step pool' enumerates 9 in-flow steps and excludes Triage which AGENTS.md:7 positions as pre-flow, (c) .claude/agents/ contains 16 files decomposing as 9 producer + 7 reviewer (Verify/Reflect/Triage lack reviewer files; Triage lacks producer file).
Report cites Ground tool_calls t2, t3, t4, t5 verbatim raw_stdout values (no paraphrase).
Report omits ED-derived fields (no ed_snapshot_version, no god_nodes_in_scope) per Ground.omitted_fields.
Report finalizes with STATUS line and the ARTIFACT pointer per orchestrator contract.

gate_rules.note: Investigate flagged needs_clarification with blocks=false on both issues; clarification is documentation reconciliation (the actual deliverable), not a precondition.
